beefs.title: Taylor Swift
quotes: Please remove if the source isn't reliable enough

These are agreed upon and sourced genres on the album's pages. It doesn't make sense to only describe Speak Now and Red as pop and rock and then say she switched from country to pop on 1989. Nor does it make sense to only mention trap for Reputation when that isn't the main genre of the album. There also is no reason not to give a sub-genre for Lover when the albums after all do. And it's misleading to say she "explored" synth-pop on Midnights and TTPD when she already did synth-pop on 1989.
